title: Chests Reimagined x MB Chest
description: Make Maybe Better Chest work with Chests Reimagined
body: A simple way to make [Maybe Better Chest](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mb-chest) to work with [Chests Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/chests-reimagined) since it goes to do many changes that break other packs
